payload.title: The Imposter Paradox: Highest Performer, Still Feels Like an Outsider
payload.body: I need to name this directly. I have been the highest performer on every team by a distance. Yet I feel like an imposter when targeting Anthropic, Apple, Google. The feeling is driving the site strategy: building an elaborate site partly because I feel I need to be undeniably impressive before anyone takes me seriously. The question for every new feature: am I adding this because it serves the target visitor, or because it makes me feel more prepared?
payload.decision: Named the tension explicitly. No resolution yet.
payload.alternatives_considered: Ignoring it. But naming it creates accountability.
payload.open_questions: Will the GTM conversation shift behavior from building to distributing?
